query:
SELECT 'nightlyAgendaEmails' as automation, status, COUNT(*) as cnt, MAX(scheduledAt) as last_scheduled, MAX(sentAt) as last_sent
  FROM nightlyAgendaEmails GROUP BY status
UNION ALL
SELECT 'dailyRecapRequests', status, COUNT(*), MAX(sent_at), MAX(replied_at) FROM dailyRecapRequests GROUP BY status
UNION ALL
SELECT 'icalFeeds', 'rows' as status, COUNT(*), MAX(lastFetchedAt), NULL FROM icalFeeds
UNION ALL
SELECT 'icalEvents', 'rows' as status, COUNT(*), MAX(forDate), NULL FROM icalEvents
ORDER BY automation, status;
